items.title: May 27, 1999: Portland’s Rasheed Wallace backs in and dunks against Utah during Game 6 of the WCSF.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 27, 1999: Portland’s Rasheed Wallace backs in and dunks against Utah during Game 6 of the WCSF.

Wallace finished with 14 PTS/3 STL and Isaiah Rider scored a game-high 24 PTS in a 92-80 victory that won the series for the Blazers. Jeff Hornacek scored 21 PTS to lead the Jazz.

items.title: Sad Bonus Hollander POTD Carey Scurry. Brooklyn hooper went to LIU & was drafted 37th by UTA in 85. Hustler & good leaper lasted 3 yrs as a bench guy (5 ppg 3 rpg). After 88, played abroad thru 97. Had struggles after retiring but got it together and wrote a book about it. RIP.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Sad Bonus Hollander POTD Carey Scurry. Brooklyn hooper went to LIU & was drafted 37th by UTA in 85. Hustler & good leaper lasted 3 yrs as a bench guy (5 ppg 3 rpg). After 88, played abroad thru 97. Had struggles after retiring but got it together and wrote a book about it. RIP.

items.title: [Vorkunov] The Jazz are the only team that earned top-5 picks in each of the last two lotteries, but the Memphis Grizzlies own Utah’s 2027 first-round pick as part of the Jaren Jackson Jr. trade ... Under the new rules, the Grizzlies’ return in the trade would be capped at the No. 6 pick next season
items.author: cleo22270
items.body_excerpt: Article: NBA’s lottery proposal changes draft pick values. Many have already been traded The Jazz are the only team that earned top-5 picks in each of the last two lotteries, but the Memphis Grizzlies own Utah’s 2027 first-round pick as part of the Jaren Jackson Jr. trade this…

items.title: Hollinger POTD Mehmet Okur. Turkish big was drafted 37th by DET in 01. Came to NBA in 02 & was good bench guy but annoyed Larry Brown. Signed big deal w/UTA in 04, scored 18 ppg & was all-star. Great stretch big but weak on D. In all, a very good player.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollinger POTD Mehmet Okur. Turkish big was drafted 37th by DET in 01. Came to NBA in 02 & was good bench guy but annoyed Larry Brown. Signed big deal w/UTA in 04, scored 18 ppg & was all-star. Great stretch big but weak on D. In all, a very good player.

items.title: I'm generally supportive of NBA's lottery reform measures. But barring Memphis from collecting a (potential) top-5 pick from Utah in 2027 is objectively ... bonkers. Jazz traded the pick. Ergo, they can't benefit from tanking. Ergo, this wrinkle serves no clear purpose. What are
items.author: Howard Beck
items.body_excerpt: I'm generally supportive of NBA's lottery reform measures. But barring Memphis from collecting a (potential) top-5 pick from Utah in 2027 is objectively ... bonkers. Jazz traded the pick. Ergo, they can't benefit from tanking. Ergo, this wrinkle serves no clear purpose. What are we doing here, NBA?

items.title: May 25, 1994: Hakeem Olajuwon goes for 41 PTS (14-22 FG)/13 REB/6 AST/3 BLK in Houston's 104-99 win over Utah in Game 2 of the Western Conference Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 25, 1994: Hakeem Olajuwon goes for 41 PTS (14-22 FG)/13 REB/6 AST/3 BLK in Houston's 104-99 win over Utah in Game 2 of the Western Conference Finals.

Mario Elie added 17 PTS off the bench for the Rockets, who took a 2-0 series lead. Karl Malone had 32 PTS/7 AST for the Jazz.

items.title: Cavaliers shot 69.7% on 2s in Game 3. If you round up, Cavs are 4th team in 3-point era to lose a playoff game and hit at least 70% of their 2s. Coincidentally, Donovan Mitchell was on the first team to do it, and lost to Jalen Brunson. Jazz lost to Mavericks in Game 3 of their 2
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt: Cavaliers shot 69.7% on 2s in Game 3. If you round up, Cavs are 4th team in 3-point era to lose a playoff game and hit at least 70% of their 2s. Coincidentally, Donovan Mitchell was on the first team to do it, and lost to Jalen Brunson. Jazz lost to Mavericks in Game 3 of their 2022 1st round series

items.title: May 23, 1997: Houston's Sedale Threatt dishes to Kevin Willis for two points during the Rockets' 118-100 win over the Utah Jazz in Game 3 of the WCF.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 23, 1997: Houston's Sedale Threatt dishes to Kevin Willis for two points during the Rockets' 118-100 win over the Utah Jazz in Game 3 of the WCF.

Also for the Rockets, Eddie Johnson scored 31 PTS (12-17 FG/5-8 3P) off the bench and Hakeem Olajuwon had 27 PTS/3 BLK.

items.title: Donovan Mitchell has been part of 4 of the WORST playoff collapses ever:
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
Donovan Mitchell has been part of 4 of the WORST playoff collapses ever:

2018: OKC comeback from down 25 points to beat the Jazz
2021: Clippers comeback down 25 points to beat the Jazz
2025: Pacers comeback down 20 points to beat the Cavs
2026: Knicks comeback down 22 points to beat the Cavs

#NBA
